title: thelypteris bordenii
intro: Thelypteris bordenii, also known as Borden's maiden fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to parts of North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves of the plant contain flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris bordenii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
